case_title: MARTIN GAEHWILER SR VS. BRICK JASON TALBOT

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TALBOT, ERICK JASON
